name: Consulta ultimos 5 DIAS TEMP S1
func:
msg.topic = "SELECT Valor, FechaHora FROM Datos WHERE SensorVariableId = 1 AND FechaHora >= datetime('now', '-5 days') ORDER BY FechaHora DESC";

return msg;
